Phase 10: Human Vascular EC Pseudobulk DE (Reduced vs Preserved)¶

Purpose: PyDESeq2 による pseudobulk 差次発現解析で、Reduced vs Preserved RV function の EC 遺伝子発現差を定量する。

Steps:

  1. Load human_vascularEC_with_scenic.h5ad (7,637 cells, n=8 samples)
  2. Aggregate counts per sample (pseudobulk)
  3. PyDESeq2: Reduced vs Preserved (LFC shrinkage with apeglm)
  4. Define Reduced-enriched / Preserved-enriched gene sets (padj<0.05, |log2FC|>0.5)
  5. GO/Reactome enrichment (gseapy)
  6. Volcano plot + MA plot
  7. GSEA: Mouse TCF4 OE signatures in Human pseudobulk ranking

Environment: scrna-main-2026Feb
Note: layers['counts'] (CellBender integer counts) must exist in the h5ad.

Paths OK

1. Load Data¶

AnnData object with n_obs × n_vars = 7637 × 17064
